title: sphaeranthus bullatus
intro: Sphaeranthus bullatus, also known as the yellow flower or bullhead button, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. Sphaeranthus bullatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in the form of capsules, tinctures, and ointments, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
